title: loretia ligustica
intro: Loretia ligustica, also known as the Ligusticum chuanxiong, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of China, classified within the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of coumarins and sesquiterpenes, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Loretia ligustica include improving blood circulation, reducing pain and swelling, and potentially lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a powder or made into a decoction, which can be consumed as a tea or added to other medicinal formulas.
